known_artifact_confounds: Windows archive/symlink materialization adds unrelated binary deletions to regex candidate.patch files; changed_paths and behavioral scores are authoritative.
Flash OpenCode ripgrep patch size includes CRLF-to-LF normalization.
Cargo.lock appears as a Pactrail candidate delta in four no-source-edit trials even though traces contain no mutation tool call; it is not scored as a solution.
leading_failure_diagnosis: Across both models, Pactrail spent every available turn on list/search/read operations and never invoked a production mutation tool. Its loop controller only detects identical repeated calls, so varied read-only investigation can consume the full turn budget without progress steering.
